creator: obrien@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu, Nov 02, 2000 at 12:16:48PM +0100, Jose M. Alcaide wrote:
> BTW, why are these changes to "sheets.map" needed? I cannot see any
> serious reason for not keeping the original file included in the a2ps
> tarball.

No clue.  I just started to host the file when it wasn't fetchable from
anywhere else.
